# Wordpress Test

iMocha’s WordPress test enables recruiters and hiring managers to hire job-fit candidates quickly and make unbiased hiring decisions. This WordPress online test is useful for hiring WordPress Developer, WordPress Designer, WordPress Expert, and WordPress Programmer. Our customers have reported up to 45% reduction in hiring time after using this WordPress test online.

## WordPress Online Test

WordPress is an open-source content management system based on PHP and MySQL. The platform helps to create, edit, and publish a website and or blog content. WordPress developer is responsible for creating adaptive and responsive designs,  front-end as well as back-end web development, and should have strong knowledge of scripting languages such as HTML, JavaScript, CSS, jQuery, etc. In addition, candidate should be  aware of all the technical aspects of the content management system. Our WordPress test is designed and developed by global WordPress experts to assess and hire WordPress developer as per industry standards.

WordPress online test helps recruiters and hiring managers to assess skills of candidates to use the WordPress platform for designing, developing and deploying creative website or blog themes as well as plugins. Our WordPress developer test ensures that the new hires will be a right fit for the position of a developer having proper HTML knowledge, WordPress CMS platform, its plugins and themes.

The process of hiring such candidates will be done through our online WordPress screening tests which are automated and will provide you with detailed analytical reports of each appeared candidate that will help you to hire better and faster.

Blue hollow ring shape above and to the left of a solid orange circle on a white background.

How it works

### Test Summary

WordPress assessment test can be taken by candidates from anywhere regardless of their time zone. WordPress skill test is designed considering EEOC guidelines, it will help you assess & hire diverse talent without any bias.

The WordPress quiz test may contain MCQs (Multiple Choice Questions), MAQs (Multiple Answer Questions), Fill in the Blanks, Whiteboard Questions, Audio / Video Questions, AI-LogicBox, Coding Simulators, True or False Questions, etc.

Useful for hiring 

* WordPress Developer
* WordPress Designer
* WordPress Expert
* WordPress Programmer

### Markdown Format

iMocha’s WordPress test helps recruiters and hiring managers to evaluate candidate’s understanding about markdown format which is a text formatting tool to convert text-to-HTML

### WordPress Functions

This WordPress online test evaluates candidate’s understanding about various WordPress functions which helps in creating and publishing web content effectively

Shuffle

### WordPress Features

Our assessment helps to validate applicant’s ability to utilize all the features in WordPress such as creating and managing effective website and its content

Shuffle

### Taxonomies in WordPress

Our test gauges candidate’s understanding about taxonomies in WordPress which helps in classification of content, data and groups it in WordPress

Shuffle

### Custom Widget

This WordPress skill test evaluates candidate’s ability to custom widget to add specific feature to a website

Shuffle
